ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone carefully holding and using a spoon. The robot's lack of fingers means we'll simulate the action through arm posture and subtle movements. Frame 1: Both arms are relaxed, ready to pick up the spoon. Frame 2: The right arm moves forward, simulating a scooping motion. Frame 3: The right arm brings the spoon to the mouth, slightly angled. Frame 4: The right arm returns to a neutral position, spoon lowered. Frame 5: Both arms relax back into their resting position.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for the spoon
right arm extends forward, preparing to scoop
scooping motion with the right arm, bringing it up
right arm lowers, the spoon is emptied
both arms return to rest, task complete
